name: Dime Bank
description_short: Community bank operating in Connecticut and Rhode Island offering personal and business checking, savings, loans, mortgages, and wealth management services.
description_long: Dime Bank is a community-focused financial institution serving Connecticut and Rhode Island with a routing number 211173373. The bank positions itself as a relationship-driven institution emphasizing local community engagement through the Dime Foundation and various sponsorship programs. The bank offers comprehensive financial services across personal and business banking segments, including deposit accounts, lending products, and digital banking tools. Dime Bank distinguishes itself through community involvement initiatives like the Dime Foundation, Dime Blue Crew, and Dime Academy, along with emphasis on personal relationship banking rather than purely digital-first service. The bank operates physical branches with recent corporate branch renovations and maintains ATM networks for customer convenience. Their product offerings span traditional banking (checking, savings, CDs) to specialized lending (construction loans, SBA loans, equipment financing). The institution serves both individual consumers and small-to-medium business customers with comparable product depth in each segment. While Dime Bank provides standard banking services typical of regional community banks, their geographic limitation to CT and RI restricts accessibility for customers outside these states. Specific interest rate competitiveness and fee structures are not detailed on the website, requiring direct customer inquiry. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Certificates of Deposit (CDs) with Progressive Earning options
Individual Retirement Accounts (IRAs) and IRA CDs
Health Savings Accounts (HSAs) for personal and business
Home equity loans and lines of credit
Equipment loans and commercial lines of credit
pros: Offers specialized construction loan products designed for custom home financing
Provides comprehensive business lending including SBA loans and commercial mortgages
Health Savings Accounts (HSAs) available for both personal and business customers
Digital banking tools including online banking, mobile banking, and digital wallet support
Active community involvement through Dime Foundation and multiple community sponsorship programs
Convenient banking access through branch network and ATMs across CT and RI
Progressive Earning CD product offering variable rate options
cons: Geographic limitation to Connecticut and Rhode Island only restricts accessibility
Website does not display current interest rates, CD rates, or loan APRs publicly
No mention of fee structures or account minimum requirements on main website
Limited information about fraud protection specifics despite dedicated fraud page mentioned
No clear information about mobile app features or digital banking capabilities details
best_for: Connecticut and Rhode Island residents seeking traditional community banking relationships
Small business owners needing specialized lending products like SBA loans and equipment financing
Consumers planning construction or home building projects requiring specialized loan products
Businesses and individuals seeking HSA account options with local banking support
diagnosis: Dime Bank is best for Connecticut and Rhode Island residents and small business owners seeking relationship-based community banking with comprehensive personal and business lending options. The main caveat is geographic limitation to two states and lack of publicly displayed rates and fees, requiring direct contact for pricing information.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
